ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operating_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating unit */,
  "l1" TEXT /* Level 1 of the organizational hierarchy */,
  "l2" INTEGER /* Level 2 of the organizational hierarchy */,
  "l3" INTEGER /* Level 3 of the organizational hierarchy */,
  "l4" INTEGER /* Level 4 of the organizational hierarchy */,
  "l5" INTEGER /* Level 5 of the organizational hierarchy */,
  "l6" INTEGER /* Level 6 of the organizational hierarchy */,
  "l7" INTEGER /* Level 7 of the organizational hierarchy */,
  "l8" INTEGER /* Level 8 of the organizational hierarchy */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the operating unit */,
  "parent_unit_id" INTEGER /* Parent unit ID for establishing parent-child relationships */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., department, division, team) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the unit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit ID linking to the operating_units table */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the personnel */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the personnel */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the unit */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the personnel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the personnel was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the personnel record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit ID linking to the operating_units table */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., budget, equipment) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "allocated_at" TEXT /* Date when the resource was allocated */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who allocated the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID linking to the personnel table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID linking to the user_roles table */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each operating unit

Timestamp of the last update to the personnel record
Unit ID linking to the operating_units table
